ExpenseItem.title: ExpenseItem
ExpenseItem.description: An item representing a travel expense or pocket money entry

id.description: Unique identifier of the expense item

category.description: The financial category of this item

title.description: The title or name of the transaction

date.description: Date of the transaction (format like MM/DD or YYYY-MM-DD)

splitMembers.description: List of member names to split this cost with

/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Shared travel expenses and pocket money entries for the group
